Description: Indicator (integer) of whether a Nasdaq Closing Cross (closing auction) occurred for the symbol on that day; treat any positive value as occurred and zero or missing as no event
Closing Cross price, the Nasdaq Official Closing Price set by the closing auction in USD
Opening Cross price, the Nasdaq Official Opening Price set by the opening auction in USD
Indicator (integer) of whether a Nasdaq Opening Cross (opening auction) occurred for the symbol on that day; treat any positive value as occurred and zero or missing as no event
Closing Cross matched shares executed during the closing auction
Opening Cross matched shares executed during the opening auction
Closing Cross matched notional value in USD, approximately closing price multiplied by closing matched shares
Opening Cross matched notional value in USD, approximately opening price multiplied by opening matched shares
